sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94178" key="*simiako/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Σιμιᾰκόν</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μέτρον</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n94178.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">metre named after Sim</tr_>(<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">m</tr_>)<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ias</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:10:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
